## Goal

This fixture exercises the harness-link exemption. The forbidden prefix
appears only inside a markdown link to the harness GitHub repo and must
NOT trigger a violation.

## Background

See [CONVENTIONS.md](https://github.com/henrik-me/agent-harness/blob/main/template/composed/CONVENTIONS.md)
for the harness composed-block contract referenced by this plan.
